g.title: Coil
g.text: EST- is sometimes labeled REF low — it is a ground reference back to the ECU,
not chassis ground. Keep it separate from pin 2 GND all the way to the ECU.

g.title: Harness
g.text: Wire colors mirror the Niterra reference photo — yours may differ by harness

g.title: ECU
g.text: EST- must return to the ECU signal ground, not chassis ground

g.title: Ground
g.text: Clean chassis ground — short, direct, star-point preferred

g.title: Battery
g.text: Switched ignition feed, fused. Do NOT use constant battery.
